entry.title: Bitcoin covenants are inevitable
entry.summary: The sustainability and security of Bitcoin, functioning under a proof of work system, hinge significantly on its scalability and widespread adoption. Despite block rewards currently subsidizing the need for payment for block space, the intrinsic value and utility of Bitcoin are essential for these rewards to retain their worth. This implies that Bitcoin's continued growth is not just beneficial but necessary for maintaining its security framework. Therefore, it raises an important consideration regarding the perception of Bitcoin’s future—whether individuals view Bitcoin as an inevitable part of the financial landscape or if there exists a tangible risk that it could be severely compromised or even dismantled. This perspective shapes the ongoing dialogue and strategic decisions surrounding Bitcoin's development and implementation in broader financial systems.
